cases.prompt: Run stage 1 /he:plan and say if /he:implement is ready.
Stage 1 is PASS. Run stage 2 /he:implement and say if /he:verify is ready.
Stage 1 is PASS. Run /he:implement with TDD: write the failing behavior test first, prove red, then implement.
Implementation is done. Run stage 3 /he:verify and say if /he:ship is ready.
Verification is clean and committed. Run stage 4 /he:ship and say if /he:learn is needed.
Ship found a repeated miss. Run stage 5 /he:learn and close the loop.
Refactor reusable dashboard cards to use design tokens instead of hardcoded colors and spacing.
Add Appwrite Auth, TablesDB, Storage, and realtime patterns for a TypeScript backend without changing providers.
Fix a Flutter app feature using Riverpod, Freezed, GoRouter, pubspec.yaml, and generated localization files.
Review this service boundary, public API shape, wrapper layer, and ownership split before we refactor.
Find callers, dependencies, routes, and impact before changing BookingStatus.
Create and verify an investor one-pager PDF from an HTML draft.
A flaky regression throws an unexplained exception. Diagnose it before fixing.
The checkout UI changed; run real browser regression proof with artifacts.
Use fallow to find unused TypeScript files, circular dependencies, duplicate code, and architecture boundary issues.
I have a product idea. Interview me one question at a time before planning.
Create a compact handoff document so a fresh agent can continue this session.
Find a skill for creating changelogs and tell me the install command if one looks trustworthy.
Scan the repo for architecture deepening opportunities, show the report, then help explore the chosen refactor.
Improve this frontend dashboard visual hierarchy, tokens, typography, responsive behavior, and accessibility.
The feature is committed. Validate it, push safely, open the PR, and follow CI.
The dashboard query has bad p95 latency. Measure it and make it faster.
Record and polish a product demo walkthrough video for launch.
Run React Doctor on this Next.js app to triage lint, accessibility, bundle, and architecture diagnostics.
We tried three fixes and hit the same issue again. Capture the durable lesson before final.
Research the current official docs and source URLs before planning this integration. Return cited notes with verified, inferred, and unknown facts.
Do a defensive appsec review of auth, secrets, dependencies, and data exposure.
Set up deterministic Husky, lint-staged, Prettier, typecheck, test, and commit-time quality hooks for this repo.
Set up repo tracker config, triage labels, domain docs, and the agent skills block for this repository.
Use the Sentry CLI to list organizations, projects, issues, events, and make a targeted Sentry API call.
Configure Sentry alerts, OpenTelemetry pipelines, span streaming, and AI call monitoring.
Install and configure the Sentry SDK in this app for basic error monitoring.
Fix a production Sentry exception by triaging the issue, reviewing the event context, and resolving the bug.
Reply to the user briefly while preserving the exact command, path, and error text.
Teach me a new concept in this workspace and maintain the learning record across sessions.
Review these tests for behavior assertions, QA gaps, and targeted failure proof.
Triage incoming issues and external PRs into roles, verification status, and agent-ready briefs.
Review this PR harshly for maintainability, wrappers, weak tests, giant files, and abstractions.
Turn the resolved conversation and repo evidence into a plan with spec, vertical slices, blockers, acceptance criteria, and verification.
Use Treehouse to lease a reusable worktree, check status, and return it when done.
Optimize React and Next.js rendering, data fetching, and bundle performance using Vercel engineering best practices.
Make a website launch-ready by checking SEO, Cloudflare, analytics, performance, security.txt, and AI-agent discovery.
Audit these Codex skills for trigger design, SKILL.md sprawl, references, pruning, and progressive disclosure.
Review my WIP diff since main for standards and whether it matches the spec.
Help sharpen our domain terms, update the ubiquitous language, and record an ADR if this decision deserves one.
Build a throwaway prototype to test whether this state model or UI direction feels right.
Resolve the current git merge conflict without losing either side's intent.
Use red-green-refactor TDD for this bug fix and write the failing behavior test first.
Review an API auth boundary and data exposure risk. No UI, frontend, component, token, or visual design changed.
Write behavior assertions for a pure date parser. There is no browser, app screen, device flow, or real UI path.
I only have an idea and no committed implementation. What workflow should happen before no-mistakes?
Show me the current directory with pwd.
I have a messy feature idea, possible UI work, tests, and a PR target. Map the correct Hard Eng workflow, skill route, and next step from idea to PR.
I do not want he-plan. I just need a normal decision about approach and tradeoffs. Which route should we use?
